options.label: Progression Balancing
options.description: A system that can move progression earlier, to try and prevent the player from getting stuck and bored early.

options.label: Accessibility
options.description: Set rules for reachability of your items/locations.

options.label: Location Balancing
options.description: Location balancing affects the density of progression items found in your world relative to other worlds.

options.label: Ramp Tricks
options.description: If enabled, generated games may require sequence breaks on the overworld map.

options.label: Deathlink
options.description: DeathLink is an opt-in feature for Multiworlds where individual death events are propagated to all games with DeathLink enabled.

options.label: Shuffle Level Order
options.description: Shuffles the order of kitchens on the overworld map.

options.label: Include Dlcs
options.description: Which DLCs should be included when 'Shuffle Level Order' is enabled?'

options.label: Include Horde Levels
options.description: Includes "Horde Defense" levels in the pool of possible kitchens when Shuffle Level Order is enabled.

options.label: Prep Levels
options.description: Choose How "Prep Levels" are handled (levels where the timer does not start until the first order is served): - Original: Prep Levels may appear - Excluded: Prep Levels are excluded from the pool during level shuffling - All You Can Eat: Prep Levels may appear, but the timer automatically starts.

options.label: Kevin Levels
options.description: Includes the 8 Kevin level locations on the map as unlockables.

options.label: Fix Bugs
options.description: Fixes Bugs Present in the base game: - Double Serving Exploit - Sink Bug - Control Stick Cancel/Throw Bug - Can't Throw Near Empty Burner Bug

options.label: Shorter Level Duration
options.description: Modifies level duration to be about 1/3rd shorter than in the original game, thus bringing the item discovery pace in line with other popular Archipelago games.

options.label: Short Horde Levels
options.description: Modifies horde levels to contain roughly 1/3rd fewer waves than in the original game.

options.label: Always Preserve Cooking Progress
options.description: Modifies the game to behave more like AYCE, where adding an item to an in-progress container doesn't reset the entire progress bar.

options.label: Always Serve Oldest Order
options.description: Modifies the game so that serving an expired order doesn't target the ticket with the highest tip.

options.label: Display Leaderboard Scores
options.description: Modifies the Overworld map to fetch and display the current world records for each level.

options.label: Stars To Win
options.description: Number of stars required to unlock 6-6.

options.label: Star Threshold Scale
options.description: How difficult should the third star for each level be on a scale of 1-100%, where 100% is the current world record score and 45% is the average vanilla 4-star score.
